case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. LORNA ZILBA et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-26-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION FLINT C. ZIDE FILED RE: CCP 1033 B (1) & (2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK
